v._note: Retrospective 2025 SAI confirming four completed conversions; effective dates explicit; announce dates require earlier N-14 filings.

v._evidence: Great-West Funds Inc N-14/A (2019-01-14): registers 'Shares of Common Stock' of Great-West Funds Inc — MF-to-MF reorganization within Great-West Funds. No ETF conversion mentioned.
Great-West Funds Inc N-14 (2019-06-14): registers common stock shares; MF-to-MF reorganization. Excerpt references Russell 1000 Value Index and Putnam sub-advisory; no ETF conversion.
Great-West Funds Inc N-14/A pre-effective amendment 1 (2019-07-12) to same MF-to-MF reorganization as 2cd349e70af8. No ETF conversion.
Great-West Funds Inc N-14/A pre-effective amendment 2 (2019-08-22) to same MF-to-MF reorganization. No ETF conversion.

Great-West Funds Inc N-14 titled 'GREAT-WEST SMALL CAP VALUE N-14' (2020-07-13): registers common stock shares. Acquiring fund is Great-West Small Cap Value Fund — still a mutual fund. No ETF conversion.

Great-West Funds Inc 497 (2020-08-14): 'Board has approved the reorganization of [Great-West Invesco Small Cap Value Fund] into the Great-West Loomis Sayles Small Cap Value Fund...also a series of Great-West Funds.' Effective ~2020-10-23. Explicit MF-to-MF merger.

Guggenheim Funds Trust N-14 filed 2026-03-18 (header: 'filed March 17, 2026'): registers 'Shares of Guggenheim Ultra Short Income ETF.' Excerpt states 'The Acquiring Fund will operate as an exchange-traded fund.' Acquired fund name not visible in excerpt (only referred to as 'the Acquired Fund'). asset_class: Ultra Short Income → fixed_income. Board date not in excerpt; announce_date = doc date. See paired 5e9e9eab71ff for acquired fund identity.

Guggenheim Strategy Funds Trust 497 dated 2026-04-17: 'reorganization of [Guggenheim Strategy Fund II] with and into a series of Guggenheim Funds Trust that was newly created specifically for the reorganization...The Acquiring Fund will operate as an exchange-traded fund.' Special meeting 2026-04-27. Acquiring ETF name not stated in this excerpt (see 588b19f749f9 for ETF name: Guggenheim Ultra Short Income ETF). MF ticker not in excerpt; effective date not stated; asset_class not determinable from excerpt alone.

Guinness Atkinson Funds 497 (2020-05-05): standard May 1, 2020 prospectus supplement for existing mutual fund lineup. Lists GAADX, GAINX etc. as mutual funds. Content is paper-vs-electronic delivery notice and investment policy. No conversion announcement visible in excerpt.
Guinness Atkinson Funds 497 (2020-09-17): May 1, 2020 prospectus supplemented through September 16, 2020. Same mutual fund lineup. No conversion announcement visible in excerpt.

Board date not in excerpt; announce_date = doc date. MF/ETF tickers not in excerpt; asset_class: Asia Pacific → equity_intl.
